parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
TxDecodeRequest is the request type for the Service.TxDecode
RPC method.

operations.summary: Simulate simulates executing a transaction for estimating gas usage.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
SimulateRequest is the request type for the Service.Simulate
RPC method.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description:
events is the list of transaction event type.
Deprecated post v0.47.x: use query instead, which should contain a valid
events query.

parameters.name: pagination.key
parameters.description:
key is a value returned in PageResponse.next_key to begin
querying the next page most efficiently. Only one of offset or key
should be set.

parameters.name: pagination.offset
parameters.description:
offset is a numeric offset that can be used when key is unavailable.
It is less efficient than using key. Only one of offset or key should
be set.

parameters.name: pagination.limit
parameters.description:
limit is the total number of results to be returned in the result page.
If left empty it will default to a value to be set by each app.

parameters.name: pagination.countTotal
parameters.description:
count_total is set to true  to indicate that the result set should include
a count of the total number of items available for pagination in UIs.
count_total is only respected when offset is used. It is ignored when key
is set.

parameters.name: pagination.reverse
parameters.description: reverse is set to true if results are to be returned in the descending order.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description:
- ORDER_BY_UNSPECIFIED: ORDER_BY_UNSPECIFIED specifies an unknown sorting order. OrderBy defaults
to ASC in this case.
 - ORDER_BY_ASC: ORDER_BY_ASC defines ascending order
 - ORDER_BY_DESC: ORDER_BY_DESC defines descending order

parameters.name: page
parameters.description:
page is the page number to query, starts at 1. If not provided, will
default to first page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
limit is the total number of results to be returned in the result page.
If left empty it will default to a value to be set by each app.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description:
query defines the transaction event query that is proxied to Tendermint's
TxSearch RPC method. The query must be valid.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
BroadcastTxRequest is the request type for the Service.BroadcastTxRequest
RPC method.

count_total is only respected when offset is used. It is ignored when key

operations.summary: GetTx fetches a tx by hash.

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: hash is the tx hash to query, encoded as a hex string.
